message:
feat(conformance): add 66 tests for under-covered zset/hash/set/list commands

Coverage expansion targeting commands with 0-3 existing test cases:
- LSET: middle/negative/out-of-range/nonexistent/wrong arity (8 tests)
- LPUSHX/RPUSHX: existing/nonexistent/multiple/wrong arity (7 tests)
- HMSET: basic/verify/overwrite/wrong arity/odd fields (7 tests)
- HKEYS: basic/nonexistent/wrong arity (3 tests)
- SUNIONSTORE/SINTERSTORE/SDIFFSTORE: basic/nonexistent/wrong arity (13 tests)
- ZINCRBY: new field/existing/negative/new key/wrong arity (5 tests)
- ZINTERSTORE: basic/verify/weights/aggregate MIN/wrong arity (7 tests)
- ZDIFF: basic/withscores/nonexistent/wrong arity (4 tests)
- ZDIFFSTORE: basic/verify/wrong arity (3 tests)
- ZRANGESTORE: basic/verify/byscore/nonexistent/wrong arity (6 tests)
- ZREVRANGE/ZREVRANK/ZREVRANGEBYSCORE: additional coverage (3 tests)

Conformance count: 3105 -> 3171

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
